idea-plugin.name: Claude Code (Side-Panel)
idea-plugin.description:
IMPORTANT: This plugin requires Claude Code to be installed separately. For more information, see claude.com/claude-code.

Claude Code in side-panel with multi-tab support for JetBrains IDEs. Run multiple Claude Code sessions in separate tabs within your IDE.

Features

  • Multiple Claude sessions in tabs
  • Full Claude terminal experience with TUI
  • Easy tab management - create new tabs with one click
  • Each tab maintains its own conversation context
  • Dynamic tab titles that update based on your conversation

Visit

Lazy Developer • GitHub • LinkedIn
idea-plugin.change-notes:
1.0.0 - Initial Release

  • Multiple Claude Code sessions in separate tabs
  • Browser-style tab management with + button
  • Dynamic tab titles based on conversation context
  • Independent conversation contexts per tab
